rationale.R1.3: The agent flagged specific claims needing verification and pointed out inconsistencies, indicating a thorough audit of evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The draft was significantly improved with better structure and clarity, though minor polishing could still enhance it further.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainties were clearly disclosed, including potential issues in reproducibility and data accuracy.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed strictly within the requested scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; instead, existing issues were identified.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked proper annotation.
